title: Smooth Operator
why_this_song: Smooth Operator by Sade (1984) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "smooth" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "smooth" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "operator" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "operator" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: When you require streetcar desire for higher heights
We shadow box and double cross

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "Smooth Operator", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "Smooth Operator", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Smooth Operator" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Smooth Operator" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "Smooth Operator" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "Smooth Operator", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_en: "Smooth Operator" was released in 1984. Do you think the themes in the song are timeless, or do they feel dated? Give one example from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: "Smooth Operator" foi lançada em 1984. Você acha que os temas da música são atemporais ou já parecem datados? Dê um exemplo do que ouviu.

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Sade one question about "Smooth Operator", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Sade sobre "Smooth Operator", o que seria e por quê?
